privileged_info_summary: The Bologna Pasubio scenario files are deployed to /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio. The scenario is based on real-world topology in Bologna, Italy (the Pasubio corridor). Analysis of `pasubio_bus_stops.add.xml` shows that all bus stops (e.g., busStop#1 through busStop#26) have the attribute `lines="--"`, meaning the exact bus line ID specified in the scenario and required for the pedestrian `<ride>` stage is `--`. There are no other explicit `line` attributes defined for vehicles in `pasubio_busses.rou.xml`. The verifier checks for a minimum of 10 valid pedestrian multi-modal routes incorporating this line ID.
